We've recently updated the game to have a lower resolution setting. When the low graphics setting is enabled, the system requirements drop drastically but some system my still have issues getting to 60 FPS. Lower specification systems may slow down the game speed. If this is your scenario, we encourage you close all other applications and ensure your system is not running any unnecessary processes in the background. A lot of elbow grease was put into this in the hopes that more people can enjoy this game on a variety of PCs.
